# WMMC CSV Parser

A PHP 7.3+ parser for Walmart MasterCard (WMMC) credit card statements, following the bank-import plugin architecture.

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Technical requirements, architecture principles, and quality standards for the repository.
- [Project_Architecture_Blueprint.md](Project_Architecture_Blueprint.md): Detailed architectural design and component overview.
- [README.md](README.md): High-level project information and basic usage.
- [parser.json](parser.json): Metadata defining the parser's configuration and namespace.
- [ro_wmmc_csv_parser.php](ro_wmmc_csv_parser.php): Core implementation of the parser logic.

## Specifications

- Input: CSV content with varying header formats (2023-2024).
- Core types: `statement`, `transaction`, and `parser` (externally provided).
- Architecture: Plugin system with dynamic discovery via JSON metadata.
